---
title: "Blog"
description: "Thoughts, notes and the occasional writeup."
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
